children.characters: Platform-wide. Manages system defaults, all Accounts, white-label branding, billing.

children.characters: The last Root Admin can never be demoted/removed (guard).

children.characters: Per-Account. Invites users, assigns roles within the Account, manages channels and recipes.

children.characters: Role is per-Account (a user can be Admin in one, Standard in another).

children.characters: Consumes channels, search and assets in Accounts they belong to. MFA optional [DEFAULT — adjustable]. Admin area hidden.
